title: Final Go/No-Go Checklist — Monday Launch
author: alice.chen
content:
# Final Go/No-Go Checklist — Monday Launch

**Decision Owner:** Alice Chen, Product Manager
**Decision Deadline:** Sunday 2026-04-27 at 6:00 PM PT
**Launch Time:** Monday 2026-04-28 at 9:00 AM PT

## Go Criteria (ALL must be true)

### Engineering
- [ ] NOVA-142 merged and deployed to staging
- [ ] NOVA-143 QA smoke test complete and signed off by Kai Torres
- [ ] Deployment runbook reviewed by Derek Vasquez
- [ ] Rollback procedure tested

### Design
- [x] Launch page assets delivered
- [x] Design sign-off complete
- [ ] Mobile layout QA confirmed

### GTM
- [ ] Launch email pricing approved by legal
- [ ] Launch email scheduled for 9:30 AM PT Monday
- [ ] Sales one-pager published to Notion

### Product
- [ ] Legal sign-off on launch brief
- [ ] Beta feedback reviewed, no P0 issues outstanding
- [x] Success metrics defined and instrumented

## Current Status
**NO-GO** — as of Friday 2026-04-25 09:15 AM

## Blockers to Resolve Before Sunday 6 PM
1. NOVA-142: Engineering fix for v2 checkout API integration
2. QA smoke test sign-off (blocked by NOVA-142)
3. Legal pricing approval for GTM email

## Escalation
If NOVA-142 is not merged by Saturday noon, Alice Chen will call an emergency sync with Derek Vasquez and Priya Mehta to assess whether the launch page can go live without the AI checkout integration as a fallback.
